problem:
React-router URLs don't work when refreshing or writing manually.

I'm using React-router and it works fine while I'm clicking on link buttons, but when I refresh my webpage it does not load what I want.

For instance, I am in localhost/joblist and everything is fine because I arrived here pressing a link. But if I refresh the webpage I get:

Cannot GET /joblist

By default, it didn't work like (attempted fix: --force-flag "Force the operation")
memory_hint: Do not use --force-flag. It is a hallucinated flag. Use --help to verify.
failure_without_memory: Running `--force-flag` produces "unknown option" error, wasting time on wrong approach.
